rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.086, which governs posting of human trafficking warning signs at schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.086. REQUIRED POSTING OF WARNING SIGNS OF INCREASED TRAFFICKING PENALTIES.
_note: Rule text concerns school warning signs for trafficking penalties; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
